ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the device */,
  "sum_of_area_of_neighbor_device" REAL /* Total area of neighboring devices */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the device */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the device */,
  "device_type" INTEGER /* Type of device (e.g., smartphone, tablet, laptop) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device category */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for each device */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was purchased */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the warranty expires */,
  "current_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current user assigned to the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the device (e.g., building, room) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, in maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_current_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type FOREIGN KEY ("device_type") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES device_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type (e.g., smartphone, tablet, laptop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the device category (e.g., mobile, computer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the device metric (e.g., battery life, processing speed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device performance record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_performance_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., repair, calibration) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_scheduled_maintenance" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_maintenance_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "calibration_type" TEXT /* Type of calibration performed (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the calibration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the calibration (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  "calibration_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the calibration */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the calibration */,
  "next_scheduled_calibration" TEXT /* Next scheduled calibration date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_calibration_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_repairs" (
  "repair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repair record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "repair_type" TEXT /* Type of repair performed (e.g., screen replacement, battery replacement) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the repair */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repair */,
  "repair_status" TEXT /* Status of the repair (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  "repair_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the repair */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the repair */,
  "next_scheduled_repair" TEXT /* Next scheduled repair date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_repairs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, engineer, technician) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_allocation" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "allocation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the allocation */,
  "allocation_type" TEXT /* Type of allocation (e.g., assignment, unassignment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_allocation_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_allocation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_categories_device_types" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device category */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_metrics_device_types" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device metric */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, engineer, technician) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
